violations.text: Handwashing signage is lacking at hand sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (containers of frosting) in the 2 dr reach in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and donut turning utensils) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and/or other debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves and dough mixer ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Several milk products was observed held at (53-54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

Prep unit located in the front counter area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until replaced or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
